public_reputation: Known around Canal Thorn Exchange through day-to-day work as local fixer.

manner: Knows who actually gets things done when formal systems slow down or become too expensive to trust. In Canal Thorn Exchange, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of local fixer in and around Canal Thorn Exchange, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.

hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of local fixer credible while absorbing the strain created by hoarding rumors, canal sabotage.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.

first_impression: Tovan Fieldmere presents as someone shaped by the duties of a local fixer and the daily pressures of Canal Thorn Exchange.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a local fixer, and proof that strangers will not make Canal Thorn Exchange harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Tovan Fieldmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a local fixer too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can get difficult things done through informal channels.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Tovan Fieldmere adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Tovan Fieldmere always knows more about Canal Thorn Exchange than is immediately visible.
